name: website-monitor-simulator
description: Educational full-stack website monitoring simulator with virtual users.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace shared && npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace shared && npm run typecheck --workspace server && npm run typecheck --workspace client
